description: Apply an agent-produced remediation plan to an upstream DataFrame. Bounded action set (drop_nulls, fill_nulls, dedup, cast_type, clip_outliers, filter_range, strip_whitespace, ...) — the LLM picks by name, this component executes safely. Full audit trail in asset metadata.

inputs.description: Two upstream assets: the raw DataFrame and the plan DataFrame.

upstream_data_key.description: Asset key producing the DataFrame to remediate.

plan_key.description: Asset key producing the plan DataFrame (columns: column, action, params, reason).

fail_on_unknown_action.description: If True, raise on unrecognized action names.
